Package application.view

Class MainMenuView

java.lang.Object
application.view.View
application.view.MainMenuView
public class MainMenuView extends View
The MainMenuView class represents the initial landing screen of the application.

It displays the game title, project credits, and primary navigation buttons (Play and Exit). This view facilitates the transition into the level selection screen and handles graceful application termination.

  • Constructor Details

    • MainMenuView

      public MainMenuView()
      Constructs the MainMenuView and initializes its UI components.

      The layout consists of:

      • A title Label using the "text-title" style class.
      • A subtitle Label for project information.
      • An HBox containing the "Play" and "Exit" buttons.
      The "Play" button triggers a TransitionType.ZOOM transition to the LevelSelectorView.

  • Method Details

    • startup

      public void startup()
      Executed when the view is switched to. Plays the main menu background music via the AudioManager.
      Specified by:
      startup in class View

    • cleanup

      public void cleanup()
      Performs necessary cleanup when the view is removed from the active scene.
      Specified by:
      cleanup in class View
